text: BVN Modulars transformed our kitchen into a masterclass. The CNC cutting and edge-banding work are absolutely flawless. Our kitchen works beautifully!
serviceType: Modular Kitchen — L-Shape with Island, Rajahmundry

text: Extremely professional service. From 3D design to factory finish to final setup, everything was seamless and completed in 20 days. Best modular furniture in AP.
The sliding wardrobes with lofts are super spacious and durable. Their Hettich soft-close fittings work smoothly. Highly recommend their factory-made quality.
